snapshot.scope: Manual review binds public/documentation surfaces, control manifests, verifier code and shared executable schemas; automated gates execute current implementation evidence separately.

reviewers.independence: Independent read-only review audited the exact Knowledge Tree UI candidate, Owner and acceptance projections, unchanged statuses, and navigation lifecycle. It first blocked an overclaimed focus-return sentence, then cleared the exact documentation-only repair and made no edits.

dimensions.summary: Main-owned body-free tree, degraded state, Note Reader navigation and exact-button-or-heading focus return are accurately located in existing owners.
API, Knowledge Model, UI and Playbook agree on the current public hierarchy, metrics, navigation and remaining semantic/scale/platform boundaries.
Three exact Service, IPC and UI evidence claims project only to existing partial rows; all Requirement, Exit and phase states remain unchanged.
Current read-only public tree and later aggregate, scale, accessibility, health/edit and packaged-platform work remain distinctly actionable.
Four existing Owner sections and two control manifests absorb the slice without a new document, duplicate contract or unrelated expansion.

verification.evidence: The final exact Knowledge Tree UI candidate passes docs, decisions, UI, independent review, TRC-001 through TRC-005, CON-001 through CON-004, dependencies, fixtures, boundaries, no telemetry, source artifacts, LEN-001 through LEN-005 and all five documentation-quality dimensions.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:contracts
verification.evidence: The PRD contract closes at 152/10/11 P0/P1/P2 items, 102 Requirements/capabilities, 144 Builds and 100 Exits; 87 Decisions and all four cross-document contract gates pass.
Semantic lock schema v3 contains 1,148 claims; three Knowledge Tree evidence claims are bound only to existing partial rows, while every Requirement, Exit and phase state remains unchanged.
LEN-001 through LEN-005 pass with 55 Markdown files, 3,449 of 3,700 entry words, 4,626 trace lines, 235,050 trace bytes and 1,151,019 of 1,210,000 governed Markdown bytes.

coordination.taskTitle: Bounded public Knowledge Tree UI executable evidence
coordination.compatibility: This candidate exposes the existing rebuildable semantic aggregate through one body-free Library bridge and localized read-only UI. It adds no durable state, model route, dependency, graph editor, phase renumbering or status promotion.
coordination.acknowledgement: Development froze the exact code/test and assembled Electron evidence. UI Design accepted the bounded slice; Product Planning synchronized only affected Owners and existing acceptance rows, and independent review cleared the exact wording repair.

nonBlockingRisks: Broader relationship and branch inputs, incremental rebuild and 10k proof remain open.
Complete visual-density and assistive-technology matrices remain open.
Signed macOS and Windows packaged-platform parity remains open.
A returned deep node may restore focus to the Knowledge Tree heading when its invoking control is no longer rendered; this fallback is contract-owned.
Knowledge Health, manual taxonomy, editing and advanced graph analytics remain open.
